## Summary / 概述
<!-- Brief description of changes / 变更简述 -->


## Type / 类型
<!-- Select the best match / 选择匹配的类型 -->
- [ ] feat: new feature / 新功能
- [ ] fix: bug fix / 错误修复
- [ ] docs: documentation / 文档
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring / 代码重构
- [ ] test: tests / 测试
- [ ] chore: maintenance / 维护

## Checklist / 自检清单
<!-- Before requesting review / 请求复查前请确认 -->
- [ ] `just lint` passes / 通过
- [ ] `just test` passes / 通过
- [ ] i18n keys added for both `en` and `zhs` if adding UI strings / 如有新增 UI 字符串，已同时添加中英文 key
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed / 如有需要，已更新文档

## Related Issues / 关联 Issue
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
